description: User examines the opinion scale results for the question about pooling earnings.
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The user is viewing a bar chart showing the distribution of ratings for a specific survey question.

description: User clicks the 'Filters' button to open the filter sidebar.
The Filters sidebar opens on the right side of the screen.
frame_description: A sidebar titled 'Filters' appears on the right side of the interface.

description: User clicks the 'Select filter' dropdown menu.
User selects 'Study blocks' and then chooses the 'Make a withdrawal from your Wallet' task to filter the results.
User enters '5' into the rating filter input field.
The results chart updates to show 100% for rating 5 based on the applied filters.
frame_description: The bar chart on the main page refreshes to show the filtered data.

description: User reviews the updated, filtered results on the page.
